title: PR B — Port existing managed files into the `managedfiles` framework
summary: Implementation plan migrating five specgraph-managed config/markdown files onto the managedfiles framework with byte-identical output guarantees.
notes: Structured as an implementation/design plan (docs/plans/) rather than a pure ADR or PRD. Contains concrete implementation contracts (strategy tables, scope tables, architecture section) closer to SPEC, but also carries narrative plan/risk sections typical of DOC. Classified SPEC due to precedence rule (SPEC > DOC) given competing signals.
